description: Step-by-step guide to create a copy of an existing EMR visit, modify the copied visit, and save, print, or email the updated visit notes in Clinicea.

description: Step-by-step guide to compare EMR visits within a selected date range, review visit history in tabular format, and print or email the comparison in Clinicea.

description: Step-by-step guide to merge duplicate client records and combine patient information into a single client profile in Clinicea.

title: How to create a bill in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to create a patient bill, add bill items, select payment mode, and save, print, or email the bill in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to accept payment in a due bill in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to search for a due bill, accept pending payment, select payment mode, and save, print, or email the updated bill in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to take an advance payment in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to take an advance payment from a patient, select payment mode, and save, print, or email the advance payment receipt in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to use an advance to settle a due bill in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to use a patient's advance balance to settle a due bill, save the updated bill, and print or email the receipt in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to take a payment to settle multiple due bills in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to accept a payment from a patient and automatically settle multiple due bills, while handling extra amount as advance payment in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to add individual discount in bill and bill auto discount calculation in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to apply individual discounts to bill items, edit bill totals, and automatically calculate and adjust discounts within a bill in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to cancel a bill and payment in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to cancel a bill, create adjustment entries, cancel associated payments, and manage bill or payment reversals in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to view the transaction history of a patient in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to view a patient's complete financial transaction history, including bills, payments, advance balances, due balances, exports, and printable summaries in Clinicea financials module.

title: How to create a quotation in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to create a quotation, add quotation items, apply discounts, set quotation due dates, and save, print, or email the quotation in Clinicea financials advanced module.

title: How to convert quotation to a bill in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to convert an approved quotation into a standalone bill, transfer quotation items into bill items, collect payment, and save or print the final bill in Clinicea financials advanced module.

title: How to convert quotation to a package bill in Clinicea
keywords: convert quotation items to package items
description: Step-by-step guide to convert a quotation with multiple-session services into a trackable package bill, collect payment, and save or print the package bill in Clinicea financials advanced module.

title: How to create a package bill in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to create a package bill, add package items, collect payment, schedule package sessions from the calendar, track session completion, and manage package workflows in Clinicea financials advanced module.

title: How to create a custom package bill in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step walkthrough to create a custom package bill in Clinicea, add service items with sessions, collect payment, schedule package appointments, complete sessions, track package consumption, and view financial details.

title: How to cancel a package in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to cancel a patient package in Clinicea, manage cancellation settings, review consumed sessions, generate due bills, adjust advances, settle payments, and view financial details of cancelled packages.

title: How the patient will purchase a gift card and use it in a bill in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to sell a gift card to a patient, generate the gift card bill, redeem the gift card amount in a patient bill, apply gift card payment mode, and complete billing workflows in Clinicea financials advanced module.

title: How does bill discount authorisation work in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to configure discount authorisation thresholds, request approval for high bill discounts, submit internal comments, manage pending authorisations, and approve discounts through manager workflows in Clinicea financials advanced module.

title: How to create and redeem promotion coupons in Clinicea
description: Step-by-step guide to create promotion coupons in Clinicea, configure coupon codes and discount logic, upload coupon images, define coupon availability, redeem coupons during billing, apply discounts, and validate one-time coupon usage.

title: How to add a non-batchable inventory in Clinicea
description: Learn how to create and manage a non-batchable inventory item in Clinicea, including quantity setup, reorder levels, tax configuration, buying and selling prices, and category assignment.
keywords: maintain incoming stock by batch no off

title: How to add a batchable inventory in Clinicea
description: Learn how to create a batchable inventory item in Clinicea by enabling batch tracking, adding batch number and expiry date, configuring buying and selling prices with tax calculations, setting reorder levels, assigning categories, and managing stock using FIFO inventory dispensing.
keywords: maintain incoming stock by batch no

title: How to manually reconcile the stock of a non-batchable inventory in Clinicea
description: Learn how to manually reconcile stock for a non-batchable inventory item in Clinicea by identifying non-batchable items, increasing or decreasing stock quantities, backdating stock adjustments, adding transaction notes and reasons, and reviewing inventory transaction history for complete stock reconciliation tracking.

title: How to manually reconcile the stock of a batchable inventory in Clinicea
description: Learn how to manually reconcile stock for batchable inventory items in Clinicea. This guide covers identifying batchable items using the 'Batching On' tag, increasing or decreasing stock for specific batches, backdating transaction dates, adding transaction notes, selecting reasons for stock reduction, and viewing complete transaction history for batch-wise reconciliation.

title: How to add a batch to an existing inventory in Clinicea
description: Learn the process of adding a new batch to existing inventory items in Clinicea. This guide covers navigating to the Inventory module, selecting an item, and using the 'Increase Stock' page to enter batch details including Batch Number, Expiry Date, and Quantity. It also explains how to set tax percentages for buying and selling prices, resulting in automatic calculations of after-tax prices and total quantity updates.

title: How to create a purchase order and receive stock in Clinicea
description: A comprehensive guide on managing the full procurement lifecycle in Clinicea. Learn how to create a formal Purchase Order (PO), select vendors, add inventory items with specific quantities and discounts, and generate PO documents for print or email. The guide also explains the stock receiving process, including entering batch details (Batch No. and Expiry), updating stock balances, and reviewing batch history for received orders.

title: How to receive stock without a purchase order in Clinicea
description: Learn how to record incoming stock in Clinicea without a pre-existing Purchase Order. This guide walks you through the 'Receive Stock' workflow under the Vendor tab, including selecting vendors, adding inventory items, and entering essential batch details like Batch Number and Expiry Date. It also covers entering quantities, free stock, and discounts to generate a Received Stock Order and verify updates in the Batch History.

title: How to return stock to vendor in Clinicea
description: Learn how to efficiently manage stock returns to vendors within Clinicea. This guide covers navigating to the Vendor tab, initiating a 'Return Stock' transaction, selecting the relevant vendor, and adding items by their specific batch numbers. It also details how to enter return quantities and verify the generated 'Returned Stock Order' and updated inventory levels through the Batch History.

title: How can a clinic send stock to another clinic even if there is no request for it in Clinicea
description: Learn how to perform proactive clinic-to-clinic stock transfers in Clinicea without an existing request. This guide explains how to use the 'Clinic to Clinic' tab under Stock Movement to initiate a 'Sent Stock' transaction, select the receiving clinic, choose specific inventory items by batch number, and record the quantity sent to complete the transfer efficiently.

title: How can a clinic receive stock being sent to it from another clinic in Clinicea
description: Learn how to formally receive and acknowledge stock transfers from another clinic within Clinicea. This guide covers navigating to the 'Clinic to Clinic' tab under Stock Movement, locating the incoming stock entry from the sender clinic, verifying item details, and confirming the receipt to automatically update your local stock balances.

title: How can a clinic request stock from another clinic in Clinicea
description: Learn the step-by-step process of requesting inventory items from another clinic branch within Clinicea. This guide covers navigating to the 'Clinic to Clinic' tab, selecting the source clinic, adding specific inventory items, and specifying the required quantities to successfully initiate a stock request.

title: How can a clinic send stock in response to a request from another clinic in Clinicea
description: Learn how to fulfill inter-clinic stock requests in Clinicea. This guide covers navigating to the 'Clinic to Clinic' tab under Stock Movement, locating a request from a receiver clinic, and processing the transfer by selecting specific inventory batches, entering batch numbers, and setting expiry dates to formally close the request and send the stock.

title: How to read the dashboard in reports on Clinicea
description: Learn how to effectively interpret the Reports Dashboard in Clinicea to track your clinic's daily performance. This guide explains how to view key metrics like scheduled appointments, new patient registrations, EMR visits, and billing summaries, including how to compare current data against previous periods and switch between 7-day or 1-month summaries.

title: How to view and filter reports in Clinicea
description: Learn how to access, analyze, and customize reports in Clinicea. This guide demonstrates how to select report categories, search for specific reports, load data for present or past dates, and apply advanced filters like custom date ranges and report criteria for detailed analysis.

title: How to shortlist your favorite reports in Clinicea
description: Learn how to easily manage and access your most-used reports in Clinicea. This guide shows how to view report descriptions by hovering over the information icon and how to use the 'star' button to shortlist reports, ensuring they appear at the top of your list for quick future access.

title: How to shortlist your favorite reports in Clinicea
description: Learn how to easily manage and access your most-used reports in Clinicea. This guide shows how to view report descriptions by hovering over the information icon and how to use the 'star' button to shortlist reports, ensuring they appear at the top of your list for quick future access.

title: How to export a report in Clinicea
description: Learn the process of exporting reports from Clinicea to your local system or email. This guide covers how to initiate an export, verify the destination email address (automatically pulled from your profile or login ID), and the two ways to access your data: via a download link sent to your email or by directly downloading the Excel file from the export page.

title: How to setup and login using SSO in clinicea
description: Learn how to configure and use Single Sign-On (SSO) in Clinicea. This guide provides a walkthrough of the setup process within the Organization Security settings and demonstrates how users can securely log in using their Microsoft ID for a streamlined authentication experience.

title: Clinicea Support and Getting Started
description: Access comprehensive support for Clinicea through multiple channels. Whether you are looking for 'Getting Started' guides to simplify your clinic flow, need to send an email to the support team, or prefer real-time assistance via the 'chat bubble' located in the lower right-hand corner, help is available to ensure a smooth experience.
